storefront.title: KiX Storefront
storefront.cart.items: {count, plural, =0 {Cart is empty} one {1 item in cart} other {# items in cart}}
storefront.meta.title: Discover stores · KiX
storefront.meta.description: Browse 12 Singapore F&B merchants live on KiX — Toast Box, Ya Kun, Heng Heng Kopi, Brew Lab. Scan, play, win a real voucher.
storefront.search.placeholder_hero: Search by store name, category, or location
storefront.hero.title: Discover stores. Play games. Earn rewards.
storefront.hero.lede: Search for the shop on your receipt or QR code (Toast Box, Ya Kun, Heng Heng Kopi, Brew Lab — see the full list below). Tap, play the game, win an actual voucher to redeem at the counter.
storefront.filters.label: Filter
storefront.results.count: {count, plural, =0 {No stores} one {1 store} other {# stores}}
storefront.empty.no_results: No stores match your filters yet.
storefront.footer.about: KiX is the gamified acquisition platform for local merchants. Discover stores, play to earn, and turn every visit into a reward.
